summary: Completed Tasks 1-4 of the Impact Preview CLI plan. All code implemented, registered, and tested. 10/10 tests pass, typecheck clean, harness validate passes.
completedTasks: Task 1: Create impact-preview command — core logic and compact output
Task 2: Register impact-preview command in program builder
Task 3: Write tests — edge cases (no staged files, no graph)
Task 4: Write tests — compact, detailed, and per-file output formats
pendingTasks: Task 5: Verify end-to-end and final validation [checkpoint:human-verify]
learnings: The plan used require('fs') in graphExists — changed to static import * as fs from 'fs' for ESM compatibility
vitest tests must be run from packages/cli directory (cd into it) for the config to resolve correctly
vi.mock('fs') with simple factory works fine for mocking existsSync when source uses import * as fs from 'fs'
